highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My lean is to defer to the trend.

I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “ In an ultra bull case , ES will just flag out above 6978 (or quick trap below), then run….Next targets are 7006, 7017-22, 7036, then 7050 to make an all time high.” We trapped under 6978 as posted last evening, and by 10am, we finally tagged that 7006 target.
The cause was the same thing that causes every single long in ES: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
They firstly wait for a vertical, elevator down sell.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “Below there one very obvious trade is a Failed Breakdown of the December 17th 6773 low.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.
What was the initial target for this rally?
Typically, it comes a magnet which then needs to be back-tested.
7006 is a big magnet.” Yesterday we dipped under 6935-40, trapped shorts again, then rippd ~7000, coming a little shy of that magnet.
Clearing said magnet after is always a big achievement.

post_title: After a 260 Point Rally, SPX Is Coiled Up And Resting. Is Another Big Move Ahead? February 11th Plan
